sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92073" key="r(a/|dia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥᾴδια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n92073.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easy shoes</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:227" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">227</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:251" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">251</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
